name: Trend Micro
tagline: Strong ransomware protection with AI-powered detection
description: Trend Micro offers specialized ransomware protection and AI-powered threat detection, with good family safety features for households.
longDescription: Trend Micro differentiates itself with a strong focus on ransomware protection and AI-powered threat detection. The Folder Shield feature creates protected backups of specified folders and automatically blocks unauthorized modification attempts — providing a powerful defense against ransomware encryption. The AI-powered detection engine analyzes file behavior in real-time, catching threats based on what they do rather than how they look. Trend Micro's social media privacy scanning is a unique feature that checks your social accounts for privacy risks.
cons: VPN only on most expensive plan

keyFeatures.name: Folder Shield
keyFeatures.description: Creates protected backups of specified folders that are immune to ransomware encryption. Any unauthorized modification attempt is blocked.

keyFeatures.name: AI-Powered Detection
keyFeatures.description: Machine learning engine that analyzes file behavior patterns to identify ransomware, crypto-miners, and other threats based on actions rather than signatures.

keyFeatures.name: Pay Guard
keyFeatures.description: Hardened browser environment for online banking and shopping. Opens financial websites in an isolated, protected window.

keyFeatures.name: Social Media Privacy
keyFeatures.description: Scans Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram accounts for privacy risks, oversharing, and exposed personal information.

verdict: Trend Micro is the best choice for users specifically concerned about ransomware. The Folder Shield technology provides a strong last line of defense, and the AI-powered detection catches emerging threats effectively.

faqs.question: How does Trend Micro protect against ransomware?
faqs.answer: Trend Micro uses a multi-layered approach: behavioral analysis detects ransomware-like activity, Folder Shield creates protected backups, and the AI engine identifies new variants. In our tests, Trend Micro successfully blocked 100% of ransomware samples.

faqs.question: Does Trend Micro have a VPN?
faqs.answer: A VPN is included only with the most expensive Premium Security Suite plan. It offers unlimited data and servers in 30+ countries. If you need VPN on the standard plan, Kaspersky or Bitdefender offer better included VPN value.

author.name: Sarah Mitchell
author.title: Senior Tech Reviewer
author.bio: Sarah has been evaluating cybersecurity products for 7 years.

seoMeta.title: Trend Micro Review 2026: 8.2/10 Rating | TrueTopReviews
